title: Smart Pickup Locker
description: Prevent nasty items from getting into your inventory!
body:
## 🛡️ Smart Pickup Locker

A client mod for blocking item pickup via commands.

✨ Main features

- Blocking item pickup via commands
- Builder Mode for automatically blocking building blocks
- Enabling/disabling the mod with a single command
- Blocking by item ID or item in hand

🎮 Commands:

```
/spl block - block an item
/spl allow - unblock an item
/spl list - list of blocked items
/spl builder on/off - Builder Mode
/spl on/off - enable/disable the mod
```

🛠️ Builder Mode

Automatically blocks the selection of: cobblestone, dirt, gravel, hellstone, granite, diorite, andesite, deepslate, tuff.

📋 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20x or 1.21.x
- Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
- Fabric API
- Java 21+

⚙️ Configuration

Settings are saved in `config/smartpickup.json`. You can edit them manually or via commands.
